translation.en: I go pick up the child after school.

content.sentence: Tôi đi ___ con sau giờ học.

exampleSentences: Chiều nay anh sẽ đi đón em ở trường.
Mẹ nhờ chị đón em trai sau giờ học.
Bạn có thể đón tôi ở sân bay lúc ba giờ không?
notes:
đón = to pick someone up (go somewhere to meet them and bring them back). It’s about going toward someone/something to receive them.

You use đón + person (friend, child, guest) or đón + event/time (Tết, năm mới) to mean “welcome/celebrate.” It also works with natural things like đón gió, đón nắng (face/catch the wind or sun).  

Close opposite: tiễn (see someone off).  
Near synonym: rước (more formal or ceremonial, like weddings or important guests).

content.sentence: Tôi đi ___ con sau giờ học.

translation.en: I go pick up the child after school.

notes_md:
**đón** = to pick someone up (go somewhere to meet them and bring them back). It’s about going toward someone/something to receive them.

You use **đón + person** (friend, child, guest) or **đón + event/time** (Tết, năm mới) to mean “welcome/celebrate.” It also works with natural things like **đón gió, đón nắng** (face/catch the wind or sun).  

Close opposite: **tiễn** (see someone off).  
Near synonym: **rước** (more formal or ceremonial, like weddings or important guests).
exampleSentencesTranslated: This afternoon I will go to pick up you at school.
Mom asked you to pick up little brother after school.
Can you pick up me at the airport at three o'clock?

example.vi: Tôi sẽ đón bạn ở sân bay.
example.en: I will pick you up at the airport.

definitions.vi: Nhận hoặc chào đón ai đó, thường là bằng cách đón họ.
definitions.es: Recibir o dar la bienvenida a alguien, a menudo recogiendo a esa persona.
definitions.en: To receive or welcome someone, often by picking them up.
